name: the consult engine reports the full surface namespace count (>=40 of the 43-namespace corpus)
command: printf '%s' '{"pillars":{"security":[{"concern":"c","source_id":"owasp-asvs","grounding":"grounded"}]},"needs_grounding":[]}' > d.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-consult.sh" --design d.json --json 2>/dev/null > out.json; node -e 'const j=require("./out.json");process.exit(j.namespaces_total>=40?0:1)' && echo namespaces-total-full 1>&2
